title: Mx Boost
description: This is Modpack by Mx inspire, personal fps + basic utility modpack . You can use this to increase your fps .
body:
This custom-made FPS Boost Modpack is specially optimized to give you maximum performance and ultra-smooth gameplay, even on Android Mojo launcher, Pojav launcher, Zalith launcher and low-end PCs and laptops. 🚀

✔️ Reduced Lag

✔️ Higher & Stable FPS

✔️ Better Resource Optimization

✔️ Smooth & Responsive Gameplay

✔️ Optimized for Minecraft All Version - 1.21-1.21.11

All mods are carefully selected and tested to ensure the best balance between performance and stability — so you can enjoy Minecraft without annoying lag or frame drops.

Perfect for survival, PvP, SMP, and long gaming sessions without performance issues! 💎

If you want a lag-free and fast Minecraft experience, this modpack is made for you!


How to install in game ?

Search "mrpack to Zip" on your browser and convert this file to zip then just copy past all the files in <.minecraft> folder
